# clearpass_admin_privilege (Data Source)

Retrieves the details of a specific admin privilege in ClearPass by its numeric ID or name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) Numeric ID of the admin privilege. Specify either `id` or `name` to look up an admin privilege.
- `name` (String) The unique name of the admin privilege. Specify either `id` or `name` to look up an admin privilege.

### Read-Only

- `access_type` (String) Access type of the admin privilege (UI, API, FULL).
- `allow_passwords` (Boolean) Whether passwords may be displayed in responses.
- `allow_security_configs` (Boolean) Whether the user has access to security configuration.
- `cppm_privileges` (Map of String) Privilege list for ClearPass Policy Manager in JSON object format.
- `description` (String) Description of the admin privilege.
- `insight_privileges` (Map of String) Privilege list for ClearPass Insight in JSON object format.
